description_long: This is a rectangular, modern cabinet or shelf unit featuring a wood-textured exterior and a white marble-like top surface. The front side displays three vertical panels, each with a horizontal handle, suggesting three separate compartments or doors. The back side reveals open shelving with two large compartments and a central cutout at the base, providing ample storage or display space. The sides are plain, showcasing the wood grain pattern uninterrupted. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or upscale public spaces. The materials and construction suggest durability and a premium aesthetic.
description: A modern rectangular cabinet with a wood-textured body, white marble-like top, three front doors with handles, and open shelving at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical wood-paneled doors, each with a horizontal handle, and a white marble-like top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood-textured panel and the marble-like top, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Back view revealing two open shelves and a central cutout at the base, with the marble-like top visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood-textured panel and marble-like top.
